name: Awakening
short_description: Put an end to the chaos in this 2D action platformer! Engage in hand-to-hand combat against the gangs of Everseam, earn upgrades, and take down bosses vying for control of the city
detailed_description:
Awakening is an action classic 2D platformer where you'll navigate a city on the brink of being overtaken by gangs using electronic artifacts to create dangerous enhancements. You'll engage in hand-to-hand combat with enemies while exploring diverse locations across Everseam, the central city.

To safeguard the city, you'll take control of an ECHO, a prototype robot with superior combat capabilities, designed to outmatch any human. As you progress, you'll unlock upgrades that enhance your ability to quickly defeat rivals. Your mission is to reach the end before the city is overrun by other destructive robots.
